verdict_reasoning: HSPA1A (Hsp70-1) is canonically a cytosolic/nuclear stress-inducible chaperone, but it is well-documented to translocate to the outer plasma membrane leaflet under stress and especially on tumor cells (membrane Hsp70 / mHsp70). This tumor-restricted ecto-Hsp70 is the basis for clinical programs (e.g., cmHsp70.1 antibody, TKD-peptide NK-cell therapy). Surface display is non-baseline, driven by oncogenic state and stress.
